rooms.name: Dank Cell
rooms.description: You awaken in a cold, damp cell. The stone walls are covered in moss, and the air smells of decay. A heavy iron door stands to the north.

rooms.name: Shadowy Corridor
rooms.description: A long corridor lit by flickering torches. To the south is your cell. To the west, you hear the faint sound of dripping water. To the east, a heavy wooden door. To the north, a massive gate blocks the exit.

rooms.name: Forgotten Storage
rooms.description: A dusty storage room filled with broken crates and old barrels. It looks like it hasn't been used in years. The only way out is back east.

items.name: torch
items.description: A sturdy wooden torch wrapped in oil-soaked cloth. It could provide light or a desperate weapon.

rooms.name: Guard's Quarters
rooms.description: A small room that serves as a resting place for guards. There is a simple cot and a table scattered with playing cards. The corridor is to the west.

items.name: key
items.description: A heavy, rusted iron key. It looks important enough to open the main gate.

rooms.name: The Outside
rooms.description: The cool night air hits your face. You have escaped the dungeon. Freedom is finally yours.
